category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Apache TomEE as a Jakarta EE application server based on Tomcat.
display_name_sources: Official TomEE site uses Apache TomEE.
docs_sources: Official Apache TomEE documentation page lists latest TomEE documentation, examples, and Javadocs.
source_facts.homepage is the official Apache TomEE project site.
repo_sources: Official Apache TomEE sources page says TomEE is on GitHub at https://github.com/apache/tomee and also lists the ASF GitBox source repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes TomEE as Tomcat plus Jakarta EE and MicroProfile support.
source_facts.description identifies the TomEE Plume distribution.
